Vera's Flavor

편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

verajin ACADEMY

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

UNIT 01: 문장 구조 (STRUCTURE)

영어 문장의 기본 골격을 이해하고, 동사와 준동사의 정확한 구분법을 익힙니다. 병렬구조의 원리를 통해 문장의 논리적 구조를 파악하는 능력을 기릅니다.

Testing Point 01: 동사 자리 vs 준동사 자리 완벽 구분법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 출제 유형: 선택형, 어법 판단형

핵심 개념: 한 절(clause)에는 하나의 동사만 존재합니다. 두 개의 절을 연결하려면 반드시 접속사나 관계사가 필요합니다. 동사처럼 보이지만 문장에서 명사, 형용사, 부사 역할을 하는 요소를 준동사라고 합니다.

구분 동사 준동사
기능 주어의 동작/상태 서술 (문장의 핵심) 명사/형용사/부사 역할 (문장의 보조 요소)
개수 제한 한 절에 하나만 (접속사 없이) 제한 없음
시제 표현 완전한 시제 표현 가능 제한적 시제 표현

🔑 황금 공식: 접속사[관계사]의 개수 + 1 = 동사의 개수

예시: I know that you are right. (접속사 1개 → 동사 2개)

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

이해

1. 동사의 역할과 특징

동사는 문장의 중심축으로, 주어와 수(단수/복수), 시제(현재/과거 등), 태(능동/수동)에서 반드시 일치해야 합니다. 문장의 서술어 역할을 담당하는 유일한 요소입니다.

2. 준동사의 3가지 형태와 기능

준동사 주요 기능 예시
부정사 (to-v) 명사적 / 형용사적 / 부사적 용법 To read is fun. (주어)
동명사 (v-ing) 명사 역할 전담 Reading is fun. (주어)
분사 (v-ing/p.p.) 형용사 / 부사 역할 a running man (형용사)

실전 적용 전략

Step 1: 접속사/관계사 찾기 (and, but, or, that, which, who 등)

Step 2: 동사 개수 확인 (공식 적용: 접속사 개수 + 1)

Step 3: 동사 자리 확정 후, 나머지는 준동사 역할 파악

예제 분석: During its first half century, baseball games were not played at night, which meant that the games, like the traditional work day, ending / ended when the sun set.

1. 접속사 확인: `which`, `that`, `when` (3개)
2. 필요한 동사 개수: 3 + 1 = 4개
3. 현재 동사: `were played`, `meant`, `set` (3개)
4. 결론: 빈칸은 동사 자리이므로 ended가 정답.

⚠️ 자주 틀리는 함정

함정 1: 분사구문으로 착각하는 부사들
`thus`, `thereby` 등은 접속사가 아닌 부사입니다. 이 단어들은 절과 절을 연결할 수 없으며, 주로 분사구문을 수식합니다.
❌ Thus allowing many people to access education.
✅ This allows many people to access education.

함정 2: 생략된 접속사/관계대명사 놓치기
목적격 관계대명사나 명사절 접속사 that은 종종 생략됩니다. 생략된 부분도 개수에 포함해야 합니다.
I believe (that) he is right. → 접속사 1개 생략, 동사 2개 필요.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제

  1. Scientists believe that the data they collecting / collected last year supports their hypothesis.

  2. The research conducted / conducting by the team shows promising results for cancer treatment.

  3. Take / Taking regular exercise helps maintain both physical and mental health.

  4. The government announced new policies, thus allowing / allowed more students to receive financial aid.

  5. Never before have / has so many people been connected through social media platforms.

추가 학습 자료: 패턴 분석

패턴 1: 복잡한 관계사절
The method which the researchers developed and which proved effective...
(관계사 2개, 동사 2개 필요)

패턴 2: 삽입절이 포함된 구조
The book, I believe, is worth reading.
('I believe'는 삽입절로, 문장 주요 구조(S+V)에 영향을 주지 않음)

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 02: 병렬구조의 완벽한 이해와 적용

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 핵심 포인트: 정확한 해석을 통한 구조 파악

핵심 개념: 등위접속사(and, but, or)나 상관접속사(both A and B 등)는 문법적으로 동등한 형태의 요소들을 연결하여 문장의 균형과 리듬을 만듭니다. 이를 병렬구조라 합니다.

1. 등위접속사 연결형

A and B, A but B, A or B의 형태로, A와 B는 동일한 품사(명사-명사, 동사-동사)나 동일한 구조(구-구, 절-절)여야 합니다.

2. 상관접속사 연결형

상관접속사 구조 의미
both A and B A와 B 둘 다 A와 B 모두
not only A but (also) B A뿐만 아니라 B도 점진적 강조
either A or B A이거나 B 둘 중 하나
neither A nor B A도 B도 아닌 둘 다 부정

예제 분석: The exposure to fine art allowed him to have an amazing aesthetic experience and recognize / recognized his calling to be an artist.

1. 연결 구조 파악: 등위접속사 `and`가 `allowed him` 뒤의 두 동작을 연결.
2. 병렬 대상 확인: `to have`와 병렬 구조를 이루어야 함.
3. 구조 분석: `allowed him [to have ... and (to) recognize ...]` 구조.
4. 결론: 동사원형 recognize가 정답.

⚠️ 복잡한 병렬구조 함정

함정 1: 멀리 떨어진 병렬 요소
He not only studies hard in the morning but also works diligently at night.
(studies와 works가 병렬)

함정 2: 생략된 요소 복원
I can swim faster than John (can swim).
(생략된 부분을 고려하여 비교 대상을 정확히 파악해야 함)

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제

  1. The conference aims to bring together researchers, to share their findings, and promote / promoting collaboration.
  2. She is known not only for her academic achievements but also for her / her community service.
  3. The new policy will affect / effect both students and teachers significantly.
  4. Either you submit the report today or / and you will face penalties tomorrow.
  5. The manager decided to restructure / restructuring the department and hire / hiring new staff members.
  6. The artist's work is both / not only innovative and / but also commercially successful.
  7. To achieve success requires dedication, perseverance, and work / working smart.
  8. The study compared participants who exercised regularly with / to those who lived sedentary lifestyles.
  9. The company not only improved its products but also / and also enhanced customer service.
  10. Rather than complaining about the situation, she decided to take / taking action.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
1

연습 문제

Scientists believe that the data they collecting / collected last year supports their hypothesis.
  1. ① collecting / collected
2

연습 문제

The research conducted / conducting by the team shows promising results for cancer treatment.
  1. ① conducted / conducting
3

연습 문제

Take / Taking regular exercise helps maintain both physical and mental health.
  1. ① Take / Taking
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
4

연습 문제

The government announced new policies, thus allowing / allowed more students to receive financial aid.
  1. ① allowing / allowed
5

연습 문제

Never before have / has so many people been connected through social media platforms.
  1. ① have / has
1

연습 문제

The conference aims to bring together researchers, to share their findings, and promote / promoting collaboration.
  1. ① to share
  2. ② promote / promoting
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
2

연습 문제

She is known not only for her academic achievements but also for her / her community service.
  1. ① for her / her
3

연습 문제

The new policy will affect / effect both students and teachers significantly.
  1. ① affect / effect
4

연습 문제

Either you submit the report today or / and you will face penalties tomorrow.
  1. ① Either
  2. ② or / and
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
5

연습 문제

The manager decided to restructure / restructuring the department and hire / hiring new staff members.
  1. ① restructure / restructuring
  2. ② hire / hiring
6

연습 문제

The artist's work is both / not only innovative and / but also commercially successful.
  1. ① both / not only
  2. ② and / but also
7

연습 문제

To achieve success requires dedication, perseverance, and work / working smart.
  1. ① To achieve
  2. ② work / working
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
8

연습 문제

The study compared participants who exercised regularly with / to those who lived sedentary lifestyles.
  1. ① with / to
9

연습 문제

The company not only improved its products but also / and also enhanced customer service.
  1. ① not only
  2. ② but also / and also
10

연습 문제

Rather than complaining about the situation, she decided to take / taking action.
  1. ① Rather than
  2. ② take / taking
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

UNIT 02: 준동사 (VERBALS)

준동사의 능동/수동 관계, 동사적 성질, to부정사와 동명사의 구분, 감정동사 활용법까지 완벽하게 정리합니다.

Testing Point 03: 분사의 능동/수동 완벽 구분법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆

핵심 개념: 분사(v-ing/p.p.)의 형태는 수식을 받거나 의미적으로 연결된 의미상 주어와의 관계에 따라 결정됩니다.

- 능동 관계 (의미상 주어가 동작을 함) → v-ing (현재분사)

- 수동 관계 (의미상 주어가 동작을 당함) → p.p. (과거분사)

의미상 주어 찾기 전략

분사 위치 의미상 주어 예시
명사 앞/뒤 수식 수식받는 명사 a running man (남자가 달림 → 능동)
분사구문 문장의 주어 Walking home, I met John. (내가 걸음 → 능동)
with + 명사 + 분사 with 뒤의 명사 with eyes closed (눈이 감김 → 수동)
목적격보어 목적어 I saw him running. (그가 달림 → 능동)

예제 분석: Many African language speakers would consider it absurd ... or not to distinguish whether the person described / describing is related by blood to the speaker's father or to his mother.

1. 의미상 주어 찾기: 분사의 수식을 받는 `the person`.
2. 관계 파악: 그 사람이 묘사하는 것(describing)이 아니라, 묘사되는 것(described)이므로 수동 관계.
3. 결론: 과거분사 described가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. The medicine prescribed / prescribing by the doctor proved very effective.
  2. Knowing / Known for his generosity, he donated millions to charity.
  3. The conference room equipped / equipping with modern technology will host the meeting.
  4. She found the lecture fascinated / fascinating and took detailed notes.
  5. Faced / Facing with this challenge, the team developed innovative solutions.
  6. The data collected / collecting over five years supports our hypothesis.
  7. Citizens concerned / concerning about pollution gathered to protest.
  8. The building constructed / constructing last year won an architectural award.
  9. Exhausted / Exhausting from the long journey, travelers rested at the hotel.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. The results obtained / obtaining from the experiment were surprising.
  2. Given / Giving the circumstances, we had no choice but to postpone.
  3. The athletes trained / training for years finally achieved their goals.
  4. Located / Locating in the city center, the museum attracts many visitors.
  5. The professor found the students' responses encouraged / encouraging.
  6. Absorbed / Absorbing in his work, he didn't notice the time passing.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 04: 준동사의 동사적 성질 완전 분석

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★☆☆

핵심 개념: 준동사 = 동사의 성질 + 다른 품사의 기능
준동사는 동사에서 파생되었기 때문에, 다른 품사(명사, 형용사, 부사)로 기능하면서도 동사처럼 목적어나 보어를 가질 수 있고, 부사의 수식을 받을 수 있으며, 시제와 태를 표현할 수 있습니다.

시제와 태의 표현

형태 의미 예시
to-v / v-ing 본동사와 시제 동일/미래 I enjoy reading.
to have p.p. / having p.p. 본동사보다 이전 시점 He seems to have left.
to be p.p. / being p.p. 수동 The work needs to be done.
to have been p.p. / having been p.p. 이전 시점의 수동 He claims to have been invited.

예제 분석: Jump rope is great for development / developing cooperative skills among children.

1. 구조 분석: 전치사 `for`의 목적어 자리.
2. 동사적 성질: 빈칸 뒤에 `cooperative skills`라는 목적어가 있음.
3. 품사 선택: 명사 `development`는 `of` 없이 목적어를 바로 가질 수 없음. 동명사 `developing`은 목적어를 가질 수 있음.
4. 결론: 동명사 developing이 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. Understanding / Understanding of the cultural differences requires patience.
  2. The development / developing of new technologies has accelerated rapidly.
  3. Students appreciate being given / to be given clear instructions.
  4. The project appears to complete / to have been completed ahead of schedule.
  5. To successfully implement / Successfully implementing the plan requires cooperation.
  6. I regret not studying / not to study harder for the exam.
  7. The documents need reviewing / to be reviewed before submission.
  8. Having carefully considered / Carefully considering all options, they made a decision.
  9. She claims to meet / to have met the famous author last year.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. The analyzing / analysis of market trends shows positive growth.
  2. Being constantly criticized / To be constantly criticized affected his confidence.
  3. He avoided to make / making eye contact during the interview.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 05: to부정사 vs 동명사 구분의 비밀

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆

핵심 개념: 시간 기준의 구분법
많은 동사들이 to부정사와 동명사 모두를 목적어로 취할 수 있지만, 의미가 달라집니다. 일반적으로 시간의 흐름을 기준으로 구분할 수 있습니다.

- to부정사: 미래 지향적 (아직 하지 않은 일, 앞으로 할 일)

- 동명사: 과거/현재 지향적 (이미 한 일, 하고 있는 일)

핵심 동사 5선

동사 to부정사 동명사
remember ~할 것을 기억하다 (미래) ~한 것을 기억하다 (과거)
forget ~할 것을 잊다 (미래) ~한 것을 잊다 (과거)
try ~하려고 노력하다 (의도) 시험삼아 ~해보다 (실험)
stop ~하기 위해 멈추다 (목적) ~하는 것을 멈추다 (중단)
regret ~하게 되어 유감이다 (미래) ~한 것을 후회하다 (과거)

예제 분석: When she reached her car, it occurred to her that she might have forgotten turning off / to turn off the gas range.

1. 동사 확인: `forgotten` (forget).
2. 시간 축 분석: 가스레인지를 끄는 것은 '앞으로 해야 할 일'을 잊어버린 상황. 즉, 미래 지향적.
3. 결론: to부정사 to turn off가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. Remember to lock / locking the door when you leave.
  2. I'll never forget to meet / meeting that famous scientist.
  3. She tried to open / opening the window, but it was stuck.
  4. He tried to use / using a different approach, and it worked.
  5. I regret to inform / informing you that your application was rejected.
  6. Do you regret to leave / leaving your previous job?
  7. The machine stopped to work / working suddenly.
  8. We stopped to have / having lunch at a roadside restaurant.
  9. What do you mean to say / saying by that comment?
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. Changing the schedule means to contact / contacting all participants.
  2. After finishing his speech, he went on to answer / answering questions.
  3. Despite the rain, the concert went on to perform / performing as scheduled.
  4. The old man began to tell / telling stories about his youth.
  5. It started to rain / raining heavily around noon.
  6. She loves to cook / cooking for her family on weekends.
  7. I hate to disturb / disturbing you, but this is urgent.
  8. The report needs to revise / revising before submission.
  9. This situation requires to handle / handling with extreme care.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. The proposal is worth to consider / considering seriously.
  2. I can't help to wonder / wondering about the outcome.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 06: 감정동사 마스터하기

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★☆☆

핵심 개념: 감정의 방향성이 핵심
감정을 나타내는 동사(interest, excite, bore 등)가 분사 형태로 쓰일 때, 감정의 주체와 대상 관계를 파악해야 합니다.

- v-ing: 감정을 유발하는 주체 (감정을 주는 쪽) → The movie is boring.

- p.p.: 감정을 느끼는 객체 (감정을 받는 쪽) → I am bored.

주요 감정동사 완전정리

동사 v-ing 형태 p.p. 형태
interest interesting (흥미를 주는) interested (흥미를 느끼는)
excite exciting (신나게 하는) excited (신이 난)
surprise surprising (놀라게 하는) surprised (놀란)
confuse confusing (혼란스럽게 하는) confused (혼란을 느끼는)

예제 분석: If you are constantly engaged in asking yourself questions about things you are hearing, you will find that even boring lecturers become a bit more interesting / interested...

1. 의미상 주어: `boring lecturers` (지루한 강의자들).
2. 감정의 방향: 강의자들이 흥미를 '유발하는' 주체.
3. 결론: 현재분사 interesting이 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. The documentary about climate change was extremely shocking / shocked.
  2. Many viewers were shocking / shocked by the harsh reality presented.
  3. The confused / confusing instructions led to many errors.
  4. Students felt confused / confusing about the assignment requirements.
  5. The rollercoaster ride was thrilled / thrilling for most passengers.
  6. Children were thrilled / thrilling to meet their favorite cartoon character.
  7. The lecture on quantum physics was quite fascinated / fascinating.
  8. Scientists are fascinated / fascinating by the possibility of time travel.
  9. The tired / tiring journey took more than twelve hours to complete.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. Passengers were tired / tiring after the long international flight.
  2. The magician's performance was absolutely amazed / amazing.
  3. The audience was amazed / amazing by the disappearing act.
  4. The frightened / frightening storm caused widespread power outages.
  5. Many residents were frightened / frightening by the severe weather warnings.
  6. The research findings were quite surprised / surprising to the scientific community.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 07: 전치사 to + v-ing 완전 정복

전체 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆

핵심 개념: to의 품사 구분이 관건
`to`는 to부정사를 이끄는 조사일 수도 있고, 전치사일 수도 있습니다. 전치사 `to` 뒤에는 동사원형이 아닌 명사나 동명사(v-ing)가 와야 합니다.

주요 패턴 완전정리

표현 의미 예시
be used to v-ing ~에 익숙하다 I'm used to working late.
look forward to v-ing ~을 고대하다 We look forward to hearing from you.
object to v-ing ~에 반대하다 They object to changing the policy.
when it comes to v-ing ~에 관해서는 When it comes to cooking, she's an expert.

⚠️ 헷갈리는 패턴: `used` 관련 표현

be used to v-ing: (주로 사람 주어) ~에 익숙하다.
be used to-v: (주로 사물 주어) ~하는 데 사용되다.
used to-v: (과거의 습관) ~하곤 했다.

예제 분석: ...if a cow is killed, then the hides are used to make / making shoes, clothing, and bed coverings.

1. 주어 확인: `the hides` (가죽) → 사물.
2. 의미 파악: 가죽이 신발을 '만드는 데 사용되다'는 목적/용도를 나타냄.
3. 결론: `be used to-v` 구문이므로 동사원형 make가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. She quickly got used to live / living in a foreign country.
  2. This old building is used to store / storing historical artifacts.
  3. I'm looking forward to meet / meeting you next week.
  4. The committee objects to implement / implementing the new policy.
  5. When it comes to solve / solving complex problems, he's the best.
  6. The company is committed to reduce / reducing its carbon footprint.
  7. Are you ready to begin / beginning the presentation?
  8. The flight is due to arrive / arriving at 6:30 PM.
  9. Many people are opposed to build / building the new highway.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. In addition to study / studying, she works part-time.
  2. He's devoted to help / helping underprivileged children.
  3. We're likely to finish / finishing the project by Friday.
  4. The athletes are accustomed to train / training in harsh conditions.
  5. She's eager to start / starting her new job next Monday.
  6. From morning to night / nighting, he worked tirelessly.
  7. Owing to bad / badly weather, the event was postponed.
  8. The students are addicted to play / playing video games.
  9. He's willing to take / taking on additional responsibilities.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. With regard to improve / improving efficiency, we need new systems.
  2. The medicine is used to treat / treating various infections.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항) - (틀린 것이 없을 수도 있음)

  1. The research team analyzed / analyzing the data discovered several interesting patterns.
  2. To exercise / Exercising regularly and to maintain / maintaining a healthy diet are essential for longevity.
  3. Students who are interested / interesting in the program should submit their applications by Friday.
  4. The company is committed to reduce / reducing waste and improve / improving sustainability.
  5. I remember to visit / visiting that museum when I was a child, but I forgot to buy / buying a souvenir.
  6. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The proposal ⓐsubmitted yesterday ⓑrequires careful ⓒreviewing before ⓓto implement it.
  7. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    ⓐDespite his busy schedule, he managed ⓑto complete the project on time and ⓒdelivered ⓓit personally.
  8. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.(틀린 것이 없을 수도 있음)
    The ⓐexciting news about the discovery ⓑwas ⓒreported by scientists who ⓓwere thrilled by the results.
  9. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    ⓐHaving finished the presentation, she ⓑwent on ⓒto answer questions and ⓓdiscussing the implications.
  10. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The students are ⓐlooking forward to ⓑparticipate in the international conference ⓒscheduled for ⓓnext month.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

  1. 빈칸에 가장 적절한 것을 선택하시오.
    The documentary was so _______ that many viewers were moved to tears.
    ① moved ② moving ③ move ④ to move
  2. 빈칸에 가장 적절한 것을 선택하시오.
    Rather than _______ about the problem, we should focus on _______ solutions.
    ① complaining, finding ② complain, find ③ to complain, to find ④ complained, found
  3. 빈칸에 가장 적절한 것을 선택하시오.
    The machine needs _______ before it can be used safely.
    ① to repair ② repairing ③ repaired ④ repair
  4. 빈칸에 가장 적절한 것을 선택하시오.
    _______ the instructions carefully will help you avoid _______ mistakes.
    ① Read, make ② Reading, making ③ To read, to make ④ Having read, made
  5. 빈칸에 가장 적절한 것을 선택하시오.
    The committee decided _______ the meeting until next week due to _______ circumstances.
    ① postpone, unforeseen ② to postpone, unforeseen ③ postponing, unforseeable ④ to postpone, unforeseeing
  6. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    Being a successful entrepreneur requires to take risks and to be persistence in the face of challenges.
  7. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The research conducted by the team last year showed that regular exercise not only improves physical health but also enhancing mental well-being.
  8. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    Many students find the concept of quantum mechanics fascinated, despite it being one of the most confusing topics in physics.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

  1. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The company's new policy aims at reduce costs and improve efficiency through implementing advanced technologies.
  2. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    Having been worked on the project for months, the team was disappointed to learn that it had been cancelled.
  3. 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 표현을 쓰시오.
    그는 매일 아침 조깅하는 것에 익숙해졌다.
    He _______ _______ _______ jogging every morning.
  4. 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 표현을 쓰시오.
    이 문제를 해결하는 것은 생각보다 어려운 것으로 판명되었다.
    _______ this problem proved _______ _______ than expected.
  5. 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 표현을 쓰시오.
    회의에 늦게 도착한 것을 후회한다.
    I regret _______ to the meeting late.
  6. 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 표현을 쓰시오.
    그 영화는 너무 지루해서 많은 관객들이 중간에 나갔다.
    The movie was so _______ that many audience members left halfway through.
  7. 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 적절한 표현을 쓰시오.
    새로운 시스템을 도입하는 것은 직원들을 재훈련하는 것을 의미한다.
    Introducing the new system _______ _______ the employees.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
1

연습 문제 (1/2)

The medicine prescribed / prescribing by the doctor proved very effective.
  1. ① prescribed / prescribing
2

연습 문제 (1/2)

Knowing / Known for his generosity, he donated millions to charity.
  1. ① Knowing / Known
3

연습 문제 (1/2)

The conference room equipped / equipping with modern technology will host the meeting.
  1. ① equipped / equipping

4

연습 문제 (1/2)

She found the lecture fascinated / fascinating and took detailed notes.
  1. ① fascinated / fascinating
5

연습 문제 (1/2)

Faced / Facing with this challenge, the team developed innovative solutions.
  1. ① Faced / Facing
6

연습 문제 (1/2)

The data collected / collecting over five years supports our hypothesis.
  1. ① collected / collecting
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
7

연습 문제 (1/2)

Citizens concerned / concerning about pollution gathered to protest.
  1. ① concerned / concerning
8

연습 문제 (1/2)

The building constructed / constructing last year won an architectural award.
  1. ① constructed / constructing
9

연습 문제 (1/2)

Exhausted / Exhausting from the long journey, travelers rested at the hotel.
  1. ① Exhausted / Exhausting

The results obtained / obtaining from the experiment were surprising.
  1. ① obtained / obtaining

Given / Giving the circumstances, we had no choice but to postpone.
  1. ① Given / Giving
11

  1. ① trained / training

Located / Locating in the city center, the museum attracts many visitors.
  1. ① Located / Locating

The professor found the students' responses encouraged / encouraging.
  1. ① encouraged / encouraging

연습 문제 (2/2)

Absorbed / Absorbing in his work, he didn't notice the time passing.

The development / developing of new technologies has accelerated rapidly.

연습 문제 (2/3)

The athletes are accustomed to train / training in harsh conditions.
  1. ① train / training
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
14

She's eager to start / starting her new job next Monday.
  1. ① start / starting
15

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. ① night / nighting
16

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. ① bad / badly

  1. ① take / taking
19

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. ① improve / improving

1

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항) - (틀린 것이 없을 수도 있음)

The research team analyzed / analyzing the data discovered several interesting patterns.
  1. ① analyzed / analyzing
2

  1. ① To exercise / Exercising
  2. ② to maintain / maintaining

  2. ② to buy / buying

  4. ④ ⓓwere

UNIT 03: 관계사 (RELATIVES)

관계사의 기본 역할부터 복잡한 관계사절 구조까지, 관계대명사와 관계부사의 완벽한 구분법을 마스터합니다.

Testing Point 08: 관계사의 기본 역할과 완벽 활용법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 핵심 포인트: 격 판단과 계속적/제한적 용법 구분

핵심 개념: 관계사의 이중 역할
관계사는 1) 접속사처럼 두 개의 절을 연결하면서, 동시에 2) 대명사 또는 부사로서 자신이 이끄는 절 안에서 문장 성분 역할을 합니다.

관계대명사 격 판단의 비밀

관계대명사 역할 (격) 선행사 절 내 구조
who 주격 사람 뒤에 동사가 옴 (주어 없음)
whom 목적격 사람 뒤에 [주어+동사]가 오고 목적어 없음
whose 소유격 사람/사물 뒤에 명사가 오고 완전한 절처럼 보임
which 주격/목적격 사물 주어나 목적어가 없음

예제 분석: The island was taken by the English, who / whom restored it the following year to the French by the Peace of Paris.

1. 관계사절 분석: `___ restored it the following year...`에서 동사 `restored`의 주어가 없음.
2. 격 판단: 주어 역할을 해야 하므로 주격 관계대명사가 필요.
3. 선행사 확인: 선행사는 `the English`(영국인들)로 사람.
4. 결론: 주격, 사람 선행사이므로 who가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

⚠️ 함정 패턴 완전 분석

함정 1: 삽입절 혼동 (관계대명사 + I think류)
The person who (I think) is responsible... → `I think`를 빼면 주격 `who`가 필요함을 알 수 있음.

함정 2: 전치사 + 관계대명사
`전치사 + whom/which`는 가능하지만, `전치사 + that/who`는 불가능합니다.
The pen with which I wrote... (O) / The pen with that I wrote... (X)

함정 3: 계속적 용법(콤마 뒤) 제한
콤마(,) 뒤의 계속적 용법으로는 `that`과 `what`을 사용할 수 없습니다.
He failed the exam, which disappointed his parents. (O) / ..., that disappointed... (X)

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. The scientist whom / who discovered the vaccine received international recognition.
  2. The research which / whose results were published last week contradicts previous findings.
  3. This is the hospital which / where my grandmother was treated successfully.
  4. The reason which / why he resigned remains unclear to many colleagues.
  5. The committee members, most of whom / which are experts, will review the proposals.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. The technology what / that revolutionized communication was developed in the 1990s.
  2. Anyone who / whom wants to participate should register by Friday.
  3. The book which / whose cover was damaged needs to be replaced immediately.
  4. The city where / which the conference will be held is famous for its architecture.
  5. The project, that / which took three years to complete, exceeded all expectations.
  6. The students who / whom the professor praised yesterday felt very motivated.
  7. The company whose / which profits increased significantly expanded its operations globally.
  8. The method by which / by that the problem was solved impressed everyone present.
  9. The artist whom / who I believe created this masterpiece lived in Paris.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. The documents that / what were submitted yesterday require immediate attention from management.
  2. The village which / where she grew up no longer exists due to urban development.
  3. The moment when / which I first saw the ocean remains vivid in my memory.
  4. The engineer who / whose design won the competition will lead the construction project.
  5. The evidence that / which supports this theory is overwhelming and undeniable.
  6. The conference room where / in which the meeting is scheduled can accommodate fifty people.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 09: 관계대명사 vs 관계부사 완벽 구분법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 핵심 포인트: 완전한 절과 불완전한 절 구분

핵심 개념: 절의 완전성이 결정 요소
관계사 뒤에 이어지는 절이 문법적으로 완전한지, 불완전한지에 따라 관계대명사와 관계부사가 결정됩니다.

- 관계대명사 + 불완전한 절 (주어, 목적어, 보어 중 하나가 빠짐)

- 관계부사 + 완전한 절 (주어, 동사, 필수 성분을 모두 갖춤)

완전한 절 vs 불완전한 절 판별법

관계사절 내에서 동사를 찾고, 그 동사가 요구하는 필수 성분(주어, 목적어, 보어)이 모두 있는지 확인합니다.

예제 분석: It is no coincidence that countries where / which sleep time has declined most dramatically ... are also those suffering the greatest increase...

1. 관계사절 분석: `___ sleep time has declined most dramatically`.
2. 완전성 판단: 주어(`sleep time`) + 자동사(`has declined`). 1형식으로 완전한 절.
3. 관계사 선택: 완전한 절을 이끌 수 있는 것은 관계부사.
4. 결론: 선행사 `countries`가 장소 개념이므로 where가 정답.

⚠️ 복잡한 구분 패턴들

패턴 1: 추상적 장소 선행사
`point`, `situation`, `case`, `stage` 등 추상적인 명사도 상황이나 단계를 나타낼 때 장소로 취급하여 `where`를 사용할 수 있습니다.
e.g., the point where we disagree (우리가 동의하지 않는 지점)

패턴 2: 전치사 + 관계대명사 = 관계부사
`where` = `in/at/on which`, `when` = `at/on/in which`, `why` = `for which`

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. This is the library where / which I study every day for my exams.
  2. The book where / which contains detailed information about quantum physics is on the top shelf.
  3. Do you remember the day when / which we first met at the coffee shop?
  4. The strategy when / which proved most effective was implemented company-wide last month.
  5. The reason why / which she chose this university over others remains her personal decision.
  6. The argument why / which he presented convinced the entire board of directors.
  7. This is exactly how / the way I solved the complex mathematical equation yesterday.
  8. The method how / which he used to solve the problem was quite innovative and efficient.
  9. The house where / which my grandparents lived for fifty years was recently demolished.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. The building where / which the famous architect designed won several international awards.
  2. The moment when / which I realized my mistake, I immediately called to apologize.
  3. The watch when / which stopped working yesterday was a family heirloom passed down.
  4. The place where / which offers the best view of the city is the observation deck.
  5. The restaurant where / which we had dinner last night serves authentic Italian cuisine.
  6. The circumstances where / in which such decisions are made require careful consideration and planning.
  7. The era when / which dinosaurs roamed the Earth ended approximately 65 million years ago.
  8. The period when / which historians call the Renaissance began in 14th-century Italy.
  9. The way how / in which she handled the crisis impressed everyone in the organization.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. The point where / which the two rivers meet is considered sacred by local tribes.
  2. The theory where / which explains the phenomenon has been widely accepted by scientists.
  3. The stage where / which the performance will take place has been completely renovated.
  4. The scene where / which the crime occurred was thoroughly investigated by forensic experts.
  5. The condition where / under which the agreement was signed favored both parties equally.
  6. The hospital where / which my sister works specializes in pediatric cardiac surgery.
  7. The research where / which focuses on climate change received substantial government funding.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

The documents that / what were submitted yesterday require immediate attention from management.
  1. ① that / what
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
16

연습 문제 (3/3)

The village which / where she grew up no longer exists due to urban development.
  1. ① which / where
17

  1. ① when / which

  1. ① who / whose

  1. ① where / in which

  1. ① where / which

UNIT 04: 관계사, 접속사와 전치사

Testing Point 10: what, that, which 완벽 구분법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 핵심 포인트: 선행사 유무와 절의 완전성

핵심 개념: 선행사 유무가 핵심 판단 기준
`what`, `that`, `which`는 형태가 비슷해 혼동하기 쉽지만, 선행사의 유무와 뒤따르는 절의 완전성을 기준으로 명확히 구분할 수 있습니다.

상황별 선택 가이드

구분 선행사 절의 완전성 선택
관계대명사 what ❌ 없음 불완전한 절 what
관계대명사 that/which ⭕ 있음 불완전한 절 that/which
접속사 that ❌ 없음 완전한 절 that

예제 분석: Many people do not understand (A)that / what hypnosis is a natural phenomenon. It is an altered state (B)that / what we frequently go into and out of.

(A) 분석: 선행사 없고, `hypnosis is a natural phenomenon`은 완전한 절. 따라서 접속사 that.
(B) 분석: 선행사 `an altered state`가 있고, `go into and out of`의 목적어가 없는 불완전한 절. 따라서 관계대명사 that.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/4)

  1. What / That matters most is not the result but the effort you put in.
  2. The research shows that / what regular exercise significantly improves mental health and cognitive function.
  3. What / That she told me yesterday contradicts what / that you're saying right now.
  4. The problem that / what we discussed in the meeting requires immediate attention from management.
  5. It was exactly what / that I expected from such an experienced and professional team.
  6. The fact that / what unemployment rates are rising concerns many economists and policymakers worldwide.
  7. This is what / that happens when people don't follow the safety regulations properly.
  8. The evidence that / what supports this theory has been collected over many years of research.
  9. What / That you need to understand is that / what success requires dedication and persistence.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/4)

  1. The book that / what changed my perspective on life was written by a Nobel Prize winner.
  2. I can't believe that / what he actually said those things about his former colleagues.
  3. What / That surprises me most is that / what nobody noticed the obvious mistake in calculation.
  4. The method that / what proved most effective was based on traditional techniques and modern technology.
  5. What / That we learned from this experience will help us make better decisions in future.
  6. The announcement that / what the company would merge with its competitor shocked the industry.
  7. What / That I find most interesting about this research is that / what it challenges conventional wisdom.
  8. The reason that / what he gave for his absence seems quite reasonable and understandable.
  9. What / That you're suggesting is that / what we should completely change our approach to marketing.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/4)

  1. The data that / what was collected during the experiment supports our initial hypothesis perfectly.
  2. What / That makes this discovery so significant is that / what it could revolutionize medical treatment.
  3. The news that / what he had been promoted reached us just before the weekend.
  4. I don't understand what / that you mean by saying that / what the project is impossible.
  5. What / That happened next was that / what everyone realized the importance of teamwork.
  6. The theory that / what explains quantum mechanics requires advanced mathematical knowledge and understanding.
  7. What / That concerns me is that / what students are losing interest in traditional subjects.
  8. The proposal that / what we should reduce working hours has gained support from employees.
  9. What / That you said about climate change is exactly what / that scientists have been warning.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (4/4)

  1. The discovery that / what antibiotics can lose effectiveness over time changed medical practice significantly.
  2. What / That I want to know is what / that caused the sudden change in policy.
  3. The belief that / what hard work always leads to success is not always accurate.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 11: 전치사+명사(구) vs 접속사+절 완벽 구분

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 핵심 포인트: 뒤따르는 구조의 정확한 파악

핵심 개념: 구조 파악이 핵심
의미는 비슷하지만 품사가 다른 접속사와 전치사를 구분하는 문제입니다. 뒤에 어떤 구조가 오는지를 보고 판단합니다.

- 전치사 + 명사(구)

- 접속사 + 절 (주어 + 동사)

혼동하기 쉬운 쌍들

의미 전치사 (+ 명사구) 접속사 (+ 절)
~에도 불구하고 despite / in spite of although / though
~ 때문에 because of / due to because / since
~ 동안에 during while / when

예제 분석: The dummy's job is to simulate a human being during / while a crash, collecting data that would not be possible to collect from a human occupant.

1. 뒤따르는 구조 확인: `a crash`는 관사+명사로 이루어진 명사구.
2. 품사 선택: 명사구를 이끌 수 있는 것은 전치사.
3. 결론: 전치사인 during이 정답. (`while`은 접속사)

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. Despite / Although the heavy rain, the outdoor concert continued as scheduled.
  2. Despite / Although it was raining heavily, the outdoor concert continued as scheduled.
  3. The company succeeded because of / because its innovative marketing strategy and excellent customer service.
  4. The company succeeded because of / because it had an innovative marketing strategy.
  5. During / While the summer vacation, many students take part-time jobs to earn money.
  6. During / While students are on summer vacation, many of them take part-time jobs.
  7. In addition to / Besides his regular job, he volunteers at the local community center.
  8. Instead of / Rather than complaining about the problem, we should focus on finding solutions.
  9. Due to / Since technical difficulties, the live broadcast was postponed until tomorrow.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. Owing to / As her excellent performance, she received a promotion and salary increase.
  2. According to / As the weather forecast, it will rain heavily this weekend.
  3. In case of / In case emergency, please follow the evacuation procedures immediately.
  4. Except for / Except John, all the students passed the final examination successfully.
  5. As for / As the budget proposal, we need more time to review it thoroughly.
  6. Upon / When receiving your application, we will contact you within five business days.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

  1. The scientist who / whom made this discovery will receive international recognition next month.
  2. This is the place where / which I spent my childhood and have many wonderful memories.
  3. What / That you need to understand is that / what success requires persistent effort.
  4. The reason why / which he decided to quit his job remains unclear to his colleagues.
  5. Despite / Although facing numerous challenges, the team managed to complete the project successfully.
  6. The research that / what was conducted last year provides valuable insights into climate change.
  7. During / While the conference, participants had the opportunity to network with industry experts.
  8. The method by which / by that the problem was solved impressed everyone at the meeting.
  9. What / That makes this technology revolutionary is that / what it uses renewable energy sources.
  10. The students, most of whom / which are international, adapted quickly to the new environment.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

  1. The hospital ⓐwhere my grandmother ⓑwas treated successfully ⓒis located ⓓin which the city center. (틀린 것 찾기)
  2. ⓐWhat I find most ⓑinteresting about this research is ⓒwhat it challenges ⓓconventional wisdom completely. (틀린 것 찾기)
  3. ⓐBecause of the heavy snowfall, ⓑmany flights were cancelled, ⓒwhich caused ⓓsignificant delays for travelers. (틀린 것 찾기)
  4. The professor ⓐwhose research ⓑfocuses on artificial intelligence ⓒwas invited to speak ⓓat that the conference. (틀린 것 찾기)
  5. ⓐDuring the meeting ⓑwas taking place, several important ⓒdecisions were ⓓmade regarding the project. (틀린 것 찾기)
  6. The moment _______ I saw the accident, I immediately called for emergency assistance.
    ① when ② which ③ that ④ where
  7. _______ the economic recession, many companies had to reduce their workforce significantly.
    ① Despite ② Although ③ Because of ④ Since
  8. The building _______ the famous architect designed has become a landmark of the city.
    ① where ② which ③ when ④ why
  9. _______ concerns me most is _______ students are losing interest in reading books.
    ① What, that ② That, what ③ What, what ④ That, that
  10. The conference room _______ can accommodate up to 200 people will be used for the presentation.
    ① where ② which ③ when ④ whose
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

  1. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The city where I grew up in has changed dramatically over the past twenty years.
  2. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    What surprises me is what nobody noticed the obvious error in the calculation.
  3. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    While the heavy rain, the outdoor festival was postponed until the following weekend.
  4. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The scientist whom I believe discovered this phenomenon will receive the Nobel Prize.
  5. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    That you said about climate change is exactly that scientists have been warning about.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

  1. ① Except for / Except
14

연습 문제 (2/2)

As for / As the budget proposal, we need more time to review it thoroughly.
  1. ① As for / As
15

연습 문제 (2/2)

Upon / When receiving your application, we will contact you within five business days.
  1. ① Upon / When
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
1

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

The scientist who / whom made this discovery will receive international recognition next month.
  1. ① who / whom
2

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

This is the place where / which I spent my childhood and have many wonderful memories.
  1. ① where / which
3

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

What / That you need to understand is that / what success requires persistent effort.
  1. ① What / That
  2. ② that / what
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
4

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

The reason why / which he decided to quit his job remains unclear to his colleagues.
  1. ① why / which
5

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

Despite / Although facing numerous challenges, the team managed to complete the project successfully.
  1. ① Despite / Although
6

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

The research that / what was conducted last year provides valuable insights into climate change.
  1. ① that / what
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
7

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

During / While the conference, participants had the opportunity to network with industry experts.
  1. ① During / While
8

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

The method by which / by that the problem was solved impressed everyone at the meeting.
  1. ① by which / by that
9

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

What / That makes this technology revolutionary is that / what it uses renewable energy sources.
  1. ① What / That
  2. ② that / what
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
10

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (25문항)

The students, most of whom / which are international, adapted quickly to the new environment.
  1. ① whom / which
1

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

The hospital ⓐwhere my grandmother ⓑwas treated successfully ⓒis located ⓓin which the city center. (틀린 것 찾기)
  1. ① ⓐwhere
  2. ② ⓑwas treated
  3. ③ ⓒis located
  4. ④ ⓓin which
2

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

ⓐWhat I find most ⓑinteresting about this research is ⓒwhat it challenges ⓓconventional wisdom completely. (틀린 것 찾기)
  1. ① ⓐWhat
  2. ② ⓑinteresting
  3. ③ ⓒwhat
  4. ④ ⓓconventional
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
3

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

ⓐBecause of the heavy snowfall, ⓑmany flights were cancelled, ⓒwhich caused ⓓsignificant delays for travelers. (틀린 것 찾기)
  1. ① ⓐBecause of
  2. ② ⓑmany flights
  3. ③ ⓒwhich
  4. ④ ⓓsignificant
4

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

The professor ⓐwhose research ⓑfocuses on artificial intelligence ⓒwas invited to speak ⓓat that the conference. (틀린 것 찾기)
  1. ① ⓐwhose
  2. ② ⓑfocuses
  3. ③ ⓒwas invited
  4. ④ ⓓat that
5

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

ⓐDuring the meeting ⓑwas taking place, several important ⓒdecisions were ⓓmade regarding the project. (틀린 것 찾기)
  1. ① ⓐDuring
  2. ② ⓑwas taking
  3. ③ ⓒdecisions
  4. ④ ⓓmade
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
6

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

The moment _______ I saw the accident, I immediately called for emergency assistance.
① when ② which ③ that ④ where
7

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

_______ the economic recession, many companies had to reduce their workforce significantly.
① Despite ② Although ③ Because of ④ Since
8

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

The building _______ the famous architect designed has become a landmark of the city.
① where ② which ③ when ④ why
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
9

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

_______ concerns me most is _______ students are losing interest in reading books.
① What, that ② That, what ③ What, what ④ That, that
10

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

The conference room _______ can accommodate up to 200 people will be used for the presentation.
① where ② which ③ when ④ whose
1

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
The city where I grew up in has changed dramatically over the past twenty years.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
2

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
What surprises me is what nobody noticed the obvious error in the calculation.
3

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
While the heavy rain, the outdoor festival was postponed until the following weekend.
4

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
The scientist whom I believe discovered this phenomenon will receive the Nobel Prize.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
5

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트

다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
That you said about climate change is exactly that scientists have been warning about.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

UNIT 05: 중요 형용사와 부사

형용사와 부사의 정확한 구분법부터 비교구문, 형태가 비슷한 어휘들의 완벽한 구별법까지 마스터합니다.

Testing Point 12: 형용사 vs 부사 완벽 구분법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 핵심 포인트: 수식 관계와 보어 역할 정확한 파악

핵심 개념: 품사별 역할 분담
형용사는 명사를 수식하거나 보어(주격/목적격) 역할을 합니다. 부사는 명사를 제외한 동사, 형용사, 다른 부사, 문장 전체를 수식하며 보어 역할은 할 수 없습니다.

품사 핵심 역할 예시
형용사 명사 수식 / 보어 a beautiful girl / She is beautiful.
부사 동사, 형용사, 부사, 문장 수식 She sings beautifully. / very beautiful

⚠️ 핵심 함정: 2형식/5형식 동사

감각동사 (look, feel, taste 등) + 형용사: The food tastes good. (O)

make/find/keep + 목적어 + 형용사: The news made everyone happy. (O)

예제 분석: Psychologists have many theories about why people are so sensitive / sensitively to hearing about their own imperfections.

1. 구조 분석: `be` 동사 뒤의 보어 자리. `so`는 뒤따르는 형용사/부사를 강조.
2. 역할 판단: 주어 `people`의 상태를 설명하는 주격보어가 필요하므로 형용사가 와야 함.
3. 결론: 형용사인 sensitive가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/4)

  1. The presentation was clear / clearly and everyone understood the main points perfect / perfectly.
  2. She felt terrible / terribly about missing her best friend's wedding ceremony last weekend.
  3. The medicine works effective / effectively in treating various types of chronic pain and inflammation.
  4. It's unusual / unusually for him to be late, so something serious / seriously must have happened.
  5. The weather remained stable / stably throughout the entire week of the outdoor festival.
  6. He spoke so quiet / quietly that people in the back row couldn't hear him clear / clearly.
  7. The solution seems simple / simply, but implementing it will be extreme / extremely challenging.
  8. She looked nervous / nervously before the interview, but she performed excellent / excellently.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/4)

  1. The recent / recently developed technology has made communication significant / significantly faster.
  2. Surprising / Surprisingly, the experiment produced results that were complete / completely unexpected.
  3. The team worked hard / hardly to meet the deadline, and their effort was high / highly appreciated.
  4. The new policy will be effective / effectively from next month and will affect all employees equal / equally.
  5. She drives very careful / carefully in bad weather because the roads become dangerous / dangerously slippery.
  6. The concert was amazing / amazingly good, and the audience responded enthusiastic / enthusiastically.
  7. Initial / Initially, the project seemed impossible / impossibly, but the team proved everyone wrong.
  8. The company's profits have grown steady / steadily over the past five years despite economic / economically challenges.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/4)

  1. He answered the questions confident / confidently and made a positive / positively impression on the interviewers.
  2. The final / finally decision will be made after careful / carefully consideration of all proposals.
  3. She felt pride / proud of her achievements and was extreme / extremely grateful for the support.
  4. The machine operates automatic / automatically and requires minimal / minimally human intervention.
  5. Unfortunate / Unfortunately, the weather was terrible / terribly during our vacation in Hawaii.
  6. The professor explained the concept clear / clearly using simple / simply examples that everyone could understand.
  7. The building looks modern / modernly from the outside but is traditional / traditionally decorated inside.
  8. She handled the crisis professional / professionally and remained calm / calmly under pressure.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (4/4)

  1. The results were consistent / consistently with our predictions and proved our hypothesis correct / correctly.
  2. Personal / Personally, I think the decision was wise / wisely given the circumstances.
  3. The new employee adapted quick / quickly to the work environment and proved reliable / reliably.
  4. The presentation was visual / visually appealing and high / highly informative for the audience.
  5. General / Generally speaking, the conference was successful / successfully and well-organized.
  6. The doctor spoke gentle / gently to the patient and explained the procedure thorough / thoroughly.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 13: 형태가 비슷한 형용사·부사 완벽 구별법

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 핵심 포인트: 형태별 의미 차이와 올바른 용법

핵심 개념: 형태는 비슷하지만 의미와 용법이 완전히 다른 어휘들이 있습니다. 문맥을 통해 정확한 의미를 파악하고 올바른 형태를 선택해야 합니다.

어휘 쌍 의미와 용법
late / lately late: 늦은, 늦게 / lately: 최근에 (주로 현재완료와 사용)
hard / hardly hard: 어려운, 열심히 / hardly: 거의 ~않다 (준부정어)
high / highly high: 높은, 높이 / highly: 매우, 대단히 (추상적 의미)
near / nearly near: 가까운, 가까이 / nearly: 거의 (=almost)
close / closely close: 가까운, 가까이 / closely: 면밀히, 밀접하게

예제 분석: If you try to make a short move on your own, you may find out too late / lately that your car cannot carry as much as you thought it could.

1. 문맥 파악: '너무 늦게' 알게 된다는 의미가 자연스러움.
2. 어휘 비교: `late`는 '늦게'라는 시점을, `lately`는 '최근에'라는 기간을 나타냄.
3. 결론: 문맥상 late가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. I haven't seen him late / lately, but I heard he's been working hard / hardly on his new project.
  2. The two buildings are very close / closely to each other and are close / closely connected underground.
  3. She arrived late / lately for the meeting and could hard / hardly find a seat in the crowded room.
  4. The later / latest research shows that the later / latest you go to bed, the worse you sleep.
  5. Near / Nearly half of the students live / living near / nearly the campus prefer walking to class.
  6. The patient is still alive / living, but the doctors say there's hard / hardly any hope for recovery.
  7. She felt alone / lonely in the big city despite being surrounded by millions of live / living people.
  8. The baby was asleep / sleeping peacefully in her asleep / sleeping bag when we checked on her.
  9. The airplane flew high / highly above the clouds and was high / highly visible from the ground.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. He works hard / hardly during the day but hard / hardly ever complains about being tired.
  2. Late / Lately, there have been many changes in company policy, and employees are hard / hardly adjusting.
  3. The former / latter option seems more practical, while the former / latter appears more innovative.
  4. Stand close / closely to the microphone so everyone can hear you clear / clearly.
  5. The twins look so much like / alike that even their parents sometimes confuse them.
  6. She has been working late / lately near / nearly every night to finish the last / latest project.
  7. The mountain climbers reached a high / highly altitude and were high / highly praised for their achievement.
  8. The living / alive organisms in the pond are barely living / alive due to pollution.
  9. He lives alone / lonely but doesn't feel alone / lonely because he has many close friends.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. The sleeping / asleep child was moved carefully to avoid waking her up from her deep sleeping / asleep.
  2. Close / Closely examination of the evidence shows that the two cases are close / closely related.
  3. The last / latest train leaves at midnight, and it's the last / latest chance to catch it tonight.
  4. She speaks English near / nearly fluently now, much better than when she lived near / nearly London.
  5. The professor is high / highly respected in his field and has received high / highly honors.
  6. The company's later / latest product launch was delayed, but they hope to release it later / lately this year.
  7. Hard / Hardly anyone attended the meeting, so they had to work hard / hardly to reschedule it.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 14: 비교구문의 형태와 의미 완벽 매칭

전체 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆

핵심 개념: 두 개 이상의 대상을 비교할 때, 의미(동등, 우월, 최상)에 따라 정해진 구문 형태(원급, 비교급, 최상급)를 정확히 사용해야 합니다.

비교구문 상세 분석

구분 구문 형태 의미
원급 비교 as + 원급 + as ~만큼 ...한 (동등 비교)
비교급 비교급(-er / more) + than ~보다 더 ...한 (우월 비교)
최상급 the + 최상급(-est / most) 가장 ...한 (최상 비교)

분석 1: 불규칙 변화

일부 형용사와 부사는 규칙을 따르지 않고 불규칙하게 변화하므로 반드시 암기해야 합니다.

원급 비교급 최상급
good / well better best
bad / ill worse worst
many / much more most
little less least

분석 2: 비교급을 이용한 최상급 표현

비교급 + than any other + 단수명사: 다른 어떤 ~보다 더 ...한

No other + 단수명사 ... as + 원급 + as: 다른 어떤 ~도 ...만큼 ~하지 않은

→ 두 표현 모두 사실상 최상급의 의미를 전달합니다.

e.g., He is taller than any other student in his class. = He is the tallest student.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 15: 비교급·최상급 수식 부사 완벽 정리

전체 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆

핵심 개념: 비교급과 최상급의 의미를 강조하는 부사는 정해져 있습니다. 특히 원급을 강조하는 `very`와 비교급을 강조하는 `much`를 혼동하지 않도록 주의해야 합니다.

비교/최상급 수식 부사 완벽 정리

수식 대상 수식 부사 예시
원급 very, quite, rather, extremely very cold
비교급 much, far, even, still, a lot much colder
최상급 by far, the very, much by far the coldest

⚠️ 절대 금지: `very` + 비교급

❌ The weather is very colder today. (X)
✅ The weather is much colder today. (O)

예제 분석: Robots can see, and in fact they can see much / very better than human beings, but they don't understand what they are seeing.

1. 수식 대상 확인: `better`는 `good`의 비교급.
2. 수식 규칙 적용: 비교급을 수식할 수 있는 부사는 `much`, `far`, `even` 등. `very`는 원급만 수식.
3. 결론: much가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. This restaurant serves food that is as good as / better than / the best any restaurant in the city.
  2. The more / most you practice, the good / better / best you become at playing the piano.
  3. She is intelligent / more intelligent / the most intelligent student in the entire graduating class.
  4. The weather today is much / very cold / colder / coldest than it was yesterday morning.
  5. This is by far / very the good / the better / the best movie I have seen this year.
  6. He speaks English as fluent / as fluently / more fluently as a native speaker would.
  7. The new model is slightly / quite expensive / more expensive than the previous version.
  8. Among all the candidates, she performed good / better / the best during the interview process.
  9. This problem is much / very easy / easier / easiest to solve than the previous one.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. The later / latest edition contains many / more / the most updated information than earlier versions.
  2. He is no / not less / lesser intelligent than his older brother who graduated from Harvard.
  3. The Pacific Ocean is large / larger / the largest ocean in the world by far.
  4. This year's profits are significant / significantly high / higher / highest than last year's figures.
  5. She runs as fast / faster / fastest as any professional athlete in her age group.
  6. The old / older / oldest you get, the wise / wiser / wisest you become through experience.
  7. This is one of the challenging / the more challenging / the most challenging projects we've ever undertaken.
  8. The test was much / very difficult / more difficult / most difficult than we had expected.
  9. No other city in the world is as expensive / more expensive / most expensive as Tokyo.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. The company's performance this quarter was good / better / the best it has been in five years.
  2. Learning a foreign language becomes easy / easier / easiest when you practice regular / regularly.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
1

연습 문제 (1/4)

The presentation was clear / clearly and everyone understood the main points perfect / perfectly.
  1. ① clear / clearly
  2. ② perfect / perfectly
2

연습 문제 (1/4)

She felt terrible / terribly about missing her best friend's wedding ceremony last weekend.
  1. ① terrible / terribly
3

연습 문제 (1/4)

The medicine works effective / effectively in treating various types of chronic pain and inflammation.
  1. ① effective / effectively
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
4

연습 문제 (1/4)

It's unusual / unusually for him to be late, so something serious / seriously must have happened.
  1. ① unusual / unusually
  2. ② serious / seriously
5

연습 문제 (1/4)

The weather remained stable / stably throughout the entire week of the outdoor festival.
  1. ① stable / stably
6

연습 문제 (1/4)

He spoke so quiet / quietly that people in the back row couldn't hear him clear / clearly.
  1. ① quiet / quietly
  2. ② clear / clearly
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편
7

연습 문제 (1/4)

The solution seems simple / simply, but implementing it will be extreme / extremely challenging.
  1. ① simple / simply
  2. ② extreme / extremely

UNIT 06: 명사와 대명사

대명사의 올바른 격 사용법부터 명사의 수와 수식어 구별, 혼동하기 쉬운 대명사들의 완벽한 구분법까지 마스터합니다.

Testing Point 16: 대명사의 성·수·격 완벽 마스터

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★★ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 핵심 포인트: 지시 대상 파악과 올바른 격 사용

핵심 개념: 대명사 선택의 3단계 원칙
1. 지시 대상(선행사)의 성(gender)과 수(number)를 파악한다.
2. 문장에서의 역할에 맞는 격(case)을 선택한다.
3. 재귀대명사, 가주어/가목적어 등 특수 용법을 적용한다.

특수 용법들

재귀대명사: 주어와 목적어가 동일 대상일 때 목적어 자리에 사용. (e.g., I hurt myself.)

가주어/가목적어 it: 긴 to부정사구나 that절을 대신하여 문장 구조를 단순화. (e.g., It is important to study. / I find it difficult to solve.)

that/those 치환: 앞에 나온 명사의 반복을 피하기 위해 사용. (e.g., The weather of Seoul is warmer than that of Busan.)

예제 분석: There are those who take advantage of the television time to show off their talents, hoping to get that big chance that will carry it / them to stardom.

1. 지시 대상 파악: `carry`의 목적어는 '그들을' 스타덤으로 이끌어주는 것이므로, `those who take advantage...` 즉, 복수의 사람들.
2. 격 선택: 목적어 자리이므로 목적격이 필요.
3. 결론: 복수 목적격 대명사인 them이 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/3)

  1. The students should prepare themselves / them for the challenging final examination.
  2. When Mary saw her / herself in the mirror, she / her noticed her / hers hair was messy.
  3. It / This is important for children to develop their / theirs creativity through play.
  4. The company and its / it's employees celebrated their / theirs success together.
  5. John hurt him / himself while he / him was fixing his / he's bicycle.
  6. Those / They who arrive late will not be allowed to enter the examination room.
  7. I consider it / this a privilege to work with such talented colleagues as you / yours.
  8. The team members introduced themselves / them to each other / one another.
  9. Its / It's difficult to believe that its / it's already time for us / we to graduate.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/3)

  1. The book that / which I lent to Sarah is different from that / those she / her usually reads.
  2. We / Us students should take responsibility for our / ours own learning and success.
  3. The children enjoyed themselves / them at the park, and their / theirs parents watched them / they play.
  4. It / There was he / him who suggested this / these innovative solution to our / ours problem.
  5. The quality of these / this products is superior to that / those of our / ours competitors.
  6. She found it / this interesting that her / hers ideas were similar to mine / my.
  7. Between you and I / me, I think his / he's proposal is better than her / hers.
  8. The dog wagged its / it's tail when it / its saw its / it's owner coming home.
  9. Those / They are the students who / whom I / me taught last semester.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (3/3)

  1. Each student must submit his or her / their assignment before he or she / they leaves.
  2. The manager asked we / us to finish our / ours reports by the end of the day.
  3. It / This seems that they / them have forgotten to bring their / theirs textbooks today.
  4. Whose / Who's responsibility is it / this to ensure that everyone / every one understands?
  5. The committee members expressed their / theirs opinions, but they / them couldn't reach consensus.
  6. I made it / this clear to them / they that we / us expect better performance.
  7. It / There is obvious that she / her works harder than any / anyone else in the office.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 17: 명사의 수와 수식어 완벽 마스터

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★☆☆☆☆ 핵심 포인트: 가산/불가산 명사 구분과 올바른 수량형용사 선택

핵심 개념: 명사의 종류(가산/불가산)에 따라 수식하는 수량형용사가 달라집니다. 가산 명사는 '수'의 개념, 불가산 명사는 '양'의 개념으로 접근합니다.

수량형용사 완벽 매칭 가이드

구분 가산 명사 수식 불가산 명사 수식 공통 사용
많은 many, a number of much, an amount of a lot of, plenty of
약간 있는 a few a little some, any
거의 없는 few little -

⚠️ 핵심 함정: a의 유무

a few / a little: 약간 있는 (긍정적 뉘앙스)

few / little: 거의 없는 (부정적 뉘앙스)

예제 분석: At Cambridge he seems to have had few / little interest in other subjects except science and mathematics.

1. 수식 대상 확인: `interest`(관심)는 추상명사이므로 불가산 명사.
2. 수식어 선택: 불가산 명사를 수식하는 것은 `much` 또는 `little`.
3. 의미 파악: 문맥상 '관심이 거의 없었다'는 부정적 의미이므로 `a`가 없는 `little`이 적절.
4. 결론: little이 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. The report contains many / much useful information / informations about the market trends.
  2. A number of / The number of accidents on this road has increased dramatically this year.
  3. She has few / a few close friends, but she feels happy and supported by them.
  4. There is little / a little evidence to support his claim, so most people don't believe him.
  5. The company invested a large amount / number of money in new equipment / equipments.
  6. We have plenty of / many time before the train leaves, so there's no need to hurry.
  7. Few / Little people understand the complexity of this scientific theory.
  8. Could you give me some / a few advice on how to prepare for the interview?
  9. The new system provides much / many more opportunities for career development.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. The library has a great deal of / a great number of books on various subjects.
  2. He made few / little mistakes in the exam, which was quite surprising.
  3. We need a little / a few more sugar to make the cake sweeter.
  4. Most of / Most the furniture in this room is antique and very valuable.
  5. Every / All student is required to participate in the group project.
  6. The project requires a great deal / number of effort and dedication to succeed.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 18: 부정대명사 one/another/other 완벽 정복

전체 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★☆☆☆☆ 핵심 포인트: 지시 대상의 특정/불특정 및 단수/복수 구분

핵심 개념: 부정대명사는 정해지지 않은 막연한 대상을 가리킵니다. 전체 범위가 정해져 있는지, 그리고 단수인지 복수인지에 따라 `one`, `another`, `other`, `the other(s)` 등을 구분하여 사용합니다.

용법별 완전 분석

상황 표현 의미
둘 중에서 one ... the other 하나는 ... 나머지 하나는
셋 중에서 one ... another ... the other 하나는 ... 또 다른 하나는 ... 나머지 하나는
막연한 다수 some ... others 어떤 것들은 ... 다른 것들은
정해진 그룹 some ... the others 일부는 ... 나머지 전부는

예제 분석: Mr. Potter was sailing on one of the greatest transatlantic ocean liners, but to his surprise, he found another / other passenger was to share the cabin with him.

1. 수식 대상 확인: `passenger`는 단수 명사.
2. 의미 파악: '또 다른 한 명의 승객'이라는 불특정한 추가 대상을 의미.
3. 부정대명사 선택: 'an + other'의 의미로 단수 명사를 수식하는 것은 `another`. (`other`는 복수 명사 수식)
4. 결론: another가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. There are two books on the table. One is mine, and another / the other is yours.
  2. Some people prefer coffee, while other / others prefer tea.
  3. I don't like this shirt. Could you show me another / the other one?
  4. He has three sons. One is a doctor, another / the other is a lawyer, and another / the other is an artist.
  5. This plan has some problems. We need to find another / other solutions.
  6. Of the ten applicants, three were hired. What happened to other / the other seven?
  7. One of my hobbies is reading; another / the other is hiking in the mountains.
  8. You've finished this task. Now you can move on to another / the other.
  9. Some students finished the exam early, while the others / others needed more time.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. I have two brothers. One lives in New York, and another / the other lives in London.
  2. This method isn't working. Let's try another / other approach.
  3. There are many historical sites in this city. One is the castle, and another / others are the ancient temples.
  4. She has visited many countries, but she wants to visit another / other countries in Asia.
  5. He gave me one reason, but I'm sure there are another / other reasons he's not telling me.
  6. The store is closed on one side of the street, but another / the other side is open.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

The students should prepare themselves / them for the challenging final examination.

  2. ② she / her
  3. ③ her / hers
3

  2. ② their / theirs

UNIT 07: 중요 동사 (VERBS)

Testing Point 19: 동사에 따른 목적격보어의 형태

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆

핵심 개념: 5형식 문장에서 목적격보어의 형태(to-v, v, v-ing, p.p.)는 주절 동사의 종류와 목적어와의 의미 관계(능동/수동)에 따라 결정됩니다.

주요 동사별 목적격보어 형태

동사 유형 목적격보어 형태 예시
일반 동사 (ask, allow, expect) to-v She asked me to help.
사역 동사 (make, have, let) 동사원형 (v) He made me laugh.
지각 동사 (see, hear, feel) 동사원형 (v) / 현재분사 (v-ing) I saw him cross / crossing the street.
수동 관계일 때 과거분사 (p.p.) I had my car repaired.

* 준사역동사 help: help + 목적어 + (to) v

예제 분석 1: This enables the film makers use / to use actual physical landscape as the scenery.

동사 `enable`은 목적격보어로 to부정사를 취하므로 to use가 정답.

예제 분석 2: ...I noticed smoke risen / rising from the roof of an apartment building.

지각동사 `noticed`의 목적어 `smoke`가 '피어오르는' 능동/진행의 관계이므로 현재분사 rising이 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (1/2)

  1. The manager encouraged her staff to be / be more creative.
  2. I clearly heard someone to call / call my name from behind.
  3. To prevent burnout, it's important to keep your work-life balance maintaining / maintained.
  4. The new security system will help us to protect / protecting our data more effectively.
  5. He let his son to choose / choose his own career path without any pressure.
  6. We found the front door locking / locked when we returned home late at night.
  7. The coach had the players to run / run five laps around the field as a warm-up.
  8. She felt a sense of pride to wash / wash over her as she watched her daughter graduate.
  9. The company requires all employees to attend / attend the annual safety training.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

연습 문제 (2/2)

  1. I need to get my computer fixing / fixed as soon as possible.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 20: do 동사의 여러 쓰임

전체 기출 빈도: ★★★☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ★★★★☆

핵심 개념: `do/does/did`는 앞에 나온 일반동사의 반복을 피하기 위한 대동사로 쓰이거나, 동사의 의미를 강조할 때, 또는 도치 구문에서 사용됩니다.

주요 쓰임

대동사: 일반동사구의 반복을 피하기 위해 사용. (e.g., She plays tennis better now than she did last month.)

강조: 동사의 의미를 강조. (e.g., Germans do like to discuss things a lot.)

도치: 부정어구가 문두에 올 때 조동사로 사용. (e.g., Not only does God play dice...)

예제 분석: Looking back, I learned more from my failures than I was / did from my successes.

1. 반복되는 동사구 확인: `learned ... from my successes`가 반복됨.
2. 동사 종류 파악: `learned`는 일반동사.
3. 대동사 선택: 일반동사를 대신하고 시제가 과거이므로 did가 정답.

Point Exercise

  1. There are some women who feel the same parental love for other children as they do / are for their own.
  2. As civilizations developed, so did / were fashions.
  3. We do not hear with our eyes, but sometimes it almost seems as if we do / are.
  4. "Monumental" is a word that comes very close to expressing the basic characteristic of Egyptian art. Never before and never since has the quality of monumentality been achieved as fully as it did / was in Egypt.
  5. Those who give small amounts to many charities are not so interested in whether what they are doing / being helps others.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Testing Point 21: 혼동하기 쉬운 동사들

전체 기출 빈도: ★★☆☆☆ 최근 기출 빈도: ☆☆☆☆☆

핵심 개념: 형태가 비슷하여 혼동하기 쉬운 자동사와 타동사 쌍을 구분해야 합니다. 자동사는 목적어가 필요 없고, 타동사는 목적어가 필요합니다.

주요 혼동 동사 쌍

자동사 (목적어 X) 타동사 (목적어 O)
lie - lay - lain (눕다, 놓여 있다) lay - laid - laid (~을 놓다, 눕히다)
rise - rose - risen (오르다, 뜨다) raise - raised - raised (~을 올리다, 기르다)
arise - arose - arisen (발생하다) arouse - aroused - aroused (~을 불러일으키다)
fall - fell - fallen (떨어지다) fell - felled - felled (~을 쓰러뜨리다)
find - found - found (찾다) found - founded - founded (설립하다)

예제 분석: Many of the world's major cities still lie / lay on the banks of rivers.

1. 문장 구조 분석: 동사 뒤에 목적어가 없고 `on the banks of rivers`라는 전치사구가 옴.
2. 동사 선택: 목적어가 필요 없는 자동사가 와야 함.
3. 결론: '놓여 있다'는 의미의 자동사 lie가 정답.

Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

Point Exercise

  1. Some psychologists think that the origin of jealousy lies / lays in biology.
  2. Let's take a stone lying / laying on a beach as an example.
  3. Families in ancient Egypt had its body wrapped in cloth before it was finally laid / lain to rest.
  4. Matilda had taught herself to read by studying newspapers and magazines that lay / laid around the house.
  5. A few institutions have been lying / laying the groundwork for online learning.
  6. Never give up hope, however frightening the obstacles lying / laying in your path are.
  7. She asked me to show her where I was wounded / wound, so I unwrapped the gauze that was wounded / wound around my chest.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (1/3)

  1. The new software runs significant / significantly faster than the old version.
  2. I haven't seen her late / lately, but I heard she's been working very hard / hardly.
  3. This is by far / very the more / most effective solution we have found.
  4. The quality of their products is much higher than that / those of their competitors.
  5. A number of / The number of participants in the workshop has / have exceeded our expectations.
  6. Some people enjoy socializing, while other / others prefer to spend their time alone / lonely.
  7. The instructions were not clear / clearly enough for us to understand it / them.
  8. The children were exciting / excited to see the parade, which was amazing / amazed.
  9. He found it / this difficult / difficultly to adapt to the new environment.
  10. The company needs to hire another / other ten employees to meet the demand.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (2/3)

  1. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐlatest news reports that the situation is becoming ⓑmore and more ⓒserious and requires ⓓimmediate action.
  2. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐnumber of students who prefer online classes ⓑare increasing ⓒsteady due to ⓓits convenience.
  3. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    ⓐDespite feeling ⓑterribly, she went to work and completed all ⓒher tasks ⓓprofessional.
  4. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐtwo companies are so ⓑalike that it's ⓒhard to distinguish one from ⓓanother.
  5. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐevidence presented was ⓑlittle to convince the jury of ⓒhis innocence, so he was found ⓓguilty.
  6. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐmore you practice, the ⓑmore confidently you will speak, and your skills will improve ⓒnatural.
  7. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    The ⓐhouse and ⓑits garden are beautiful, but ⓒtheir location is not very ⓓconveniently.
  8. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    ⓐThose who are interested in the position should submit ⓑtheir applications and a cover letter to ⓒwe by Friday.
  9. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    She felt ⓐlonely after her friends left, and the house seemed ⓑunusual ⓒquiet without ⓓthem.
  10. 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 찾으시오.
    Hardly ⓐanyone believed ⓑhis story because ⓒit sounded so ⓓimpossibly.
Vera's Flavor 편입영어 구문독해 Bridge 편

🔥 단원 마무리 테스트 (3/3)

  1. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The food tastes deliciously, and the atmosphere in the restaurant is very pleasantly.
  2. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The number of furnitures in this room make it feel crowded and small.
  3. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    I have two options: one is to accept the offer, and another is to look for a better one.
  4. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    She works as hard as anyone else in the office, if not harder.
  5. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The later news I heard was that the meeting had been postponed until later in the week.
  6. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The students found themselves in a difficult situation and didn't know how to solve it.
  7. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    There are much informations available online, but you need to check its reliability.
  8. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    He lives near to the school, so he can get there easy on foot.
  9. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    The project requires a great number of time and a great deal of resources.
  10. 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 바르게 고치시오.
    Between you and I, this plan is much more better than the previous one.
